item.description:
# Everything Clipboard 0.2.2
- Moves the Sparkle feed URL out of the app bundle Info.plist and into runtime updater configuration. - Switches new builds to the public GitHub Pages appcast while preserving the old raw GitHub appcast endpoint for installed copies. - Keeps the menu-bar-only setting from hiding the app's only menu-bar entry point. - Uses consistently for the user-facing app bundle and runtime executable. - Opens Accessibility settings from the Direct Paste repair flow without also triggering macOS's separate accessibility prompt. - Keeps the bundle identifier, Sparkle signing key, Keychain items, preferences, and local clipboard data continuity unchanged.

# Everything Clipboard 0.2.2
- Moves the Sparkle feed URL out of the app bundle Info.plist and into runtime updater configuration. - Switches new builds to the public GitHub Pages appcast while preserving the old raw GitHub appcast endpoint for installed copies. - Keeps the bundle identifier, Sparkle signing key, Keychain items, preferences, and local clipboard data continuity unchanged.

# Everything Clipboard 0.2.1
- Moves tester updates to the separate public GitHub update-feed repository. - Fixes Check for Updates for installed builds that should no longer depend on GitHub Pages from the private source repository. - Keeps Sparkle update archives and appcast files publicly reachable while the source repository stays private.
